title: LET SKELETONS HAVE HANDS (67 edition)
description: This pack adds hands to the skeleton entity, and adds a variant of 67 skeleton when you rename it "67", "sixseven", "six seven" etc.
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

A pack that adds hands to the skeleton entity;  
How do they hold bow without any fingers?

if you rename skeleton with a nametag _"67"_, _"six seven"_, _"sixseven"_, it will have numbers six and seven in the hands, holding and wobbling up and down   
**AYY AY, SIX SEEEVEEEN!!**
